posts.title: 士兵/軍人
posts.topic: Soldier/Military Class Overview

content.description: Soldiers and bandits are sworn enemies. Team-based units where recruiting one may trigger pursuit by entire groups.
content.rank_advancement: Accumulate 戰功 (battle merits) by killing bandits
content.promotion: 軍機處 (Military Affairs Office) issues promotion orders at merit thresholds

traits.basic_skills: Superior basic combat skills compared to other professions

posts.title: 振武軍營士兵
posts.topic: Zhenwu Military Camp Soldier - Full Class Tree

core_skills.name: 狂擊亂鬥之法 (Berserk)
core_skills.description: Consumes percentage of max chi for devastating single or multi-target attacks (1-4 or 4-11 hits)
core_skills.stat_gains: Level 70+ gains 1 gin/2 kee per level; Level 140+ gains +1 strength/courage/constitution per 10 levels

core_skills.name: 重擊術 (Powerblow)
core_skills.description: Auto-triggers with weapons; increases damage; ignores 0-50% damage resistance based on skill level

advancement_paths.name: 振武軍營統領 (Commander)
advancement_paths.requirements: Battle merit >=250k; berserk at talent cap; train with 米沛

skills.name: 強力格擋技巧 (Heavy Parry)
skills.stat_gains: Level 121 +1 resolve; Level 141 +20 gin/kee; Level 161 +2 resolve/+30 gin/kee

advancement_paths.name: 振武軍營軍師 (Strategist)
advancement_paths.gains: Ancient texts, sorcery, virtual sword techniques

enhanced_strategy_commands.mass_aid: 500 battle merit, restores chi/form to room
enhanced_strategy_commands.wis: 250 merit, boosts wisdom + armor to room
enhanced_strategy_commands.cor: 250 merit, boosts courage + armor to room

advancement_paths.name: 地府鬼卒/酆都鬼將 (Underworld Soldier/Judge General)
advancement_paths.requirements: Non-divine race, Level 40+, ghost form in 左國益處

skills.name: 酆都心經 (Hell Force) - Inner skill
skills.stat_gains: +2-3 essence, +2 chi, +2 spirit; mastery +2 dexterity/constitution; Level 140 +4 dexterity/constitution

skills.name: 黃泉判官斧 (Judgement Axe) - Dual axe

content.master_npc: 大內徵兵官 李天剛 (Li Tian Gang)

base_skills.name: 流雲鞭法 (Cloudy-whip)
base_skills.special: Chance to cause unavoidable damage or delay opponent based on alertness

base_skills.name: 大內心法 (Royal Force)
base_skills.divine_state: Merges willpower with true qi; boosts armor and damage based on skill level, constitution, and strength
base_skills.stat_progression: Level 10 grants +1 constitution and +1 agility; Level 100 grants additional +2 each; All levels: +3 essence/qi/spirit (multiplier 20/20/10)

advanced_skills.name: 八卦槍法 (Trigram Pike)
advanced_skills.ability: Enhanced parry effect (4x normal) during divine state; restores user's qi

advanced_skills.name: 重擊術 (Powerblow)
advanced_skills.effect: Increases weapon damage; ignores 0-50% of opponent damage resistance
advanced_skills.stat_bonus: Above level 101: +1 gin and kee per level

advancement_paths.name: 大內高手 (Master of Inner Court)
advancement_paths.restrictions: Excludes 刑天, 阿修羅, 夜叉 races

new_skill.name: 穹槍訣 (Sky Pike)
new_skill.ability: Divine state attacks target essence with damage determined by yin-yang five-element skills
new_skill.stat_progression: Level 20 +1 strength; Level 60 +2; Level 120 +4; Qi increases 4 per level

advancement_paths.name: 四廠錦衣衛 (Embroidered Uniform Guard)
advancement_paths.prerequisite_skills: 神龍藏蹤, 流雲鞭法 at aptitude

new_skill.name: 舞醜之鞭 (Dance Whip)
new_skill.functions: steal items, essence damage, delay targets

new_skill.name: 強力格擋技巧 (Heavy Parry)
new_skill.stat_gains: Level 121 +1 resolve; Level 141 +20 gin/kee; Level 161 +2 resolve/+30 gin/kee

Consume spirit to increase target damage/attack, minor armor/defense

Increases element damage, minor alertness/action points
